Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-24 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptional performers dominating the long-term momentum rankings. LINC ranks first with a score of 95.3, showing extraordinary consistency across all timeframes—up 1,365% over 10 years and outperforming SPY by 1,141 percentage points over the same period. ISSC ranks second with even more aggressive near-term momentum (up 304% in 1 year and 937% over 10 years), though its 5-year return of 343% lags LINC's 521%, suggesting LINC has sustained its trend longer. Both stocks pass all moving average filters and maintain "strong_buy" classifications with clean momentum signals and confirmed volatility patterns. The gap between these top two performers and the broader market is unusually wide, with both showing minimal pullback risk and strong sector correlations (LINC ties closely to materials via XLB, while ISSC shows similar positioning), indicating a concentrated strength in cyclical recovery themes rather than diversified momentum across the entire 700-ticker universe.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
